summary: Comprehensive testing of Quick/Deep mode feature for Actor's Companion. All features working correctly: mode toggle on upload page, different loading screens per mode, deep-only fields (emotional_arc, what_they_hide, layered subtext, physical_life) display correctly, quick mode correctly omits deep-only fields.
passed_tests: GET /api/ returns 200 - API health check
POST /api/analyze/text with mode=quick returns 200 with quick format (simple subtext, no emotional_arc/what_they_hide)
POST /api/analyze/text with mode=deep returns 200 with deep format (emotional_arc, what_they_hide, layered subtext, physical_life)
POST /api/analyze/text with no mode defaults to quick
POST /api/analyze/image with mode=quick works correctly
POST /api/analyze/image with mode=deep works correctly
GET /api/breakdowns returns list with mode field
Frontend: Quick/Deep toggle buttons present with data-testid='mode-quick' and data-testid='mode-deep'
Frontend: Quick mode selected by default (amber border/highlight)
Frontend: Clicking Deep mode changes selection (visual change)
Frontend: Quick loading screen shows 'Analyzing your scene' title
Frontend: Deep loading screen shows 'Deep scene study' title with 'Richer beats, layered subtext, emotional arc' subtitle
Frontend: Deep breakdown view shows DEEP badge in header
Frontend: Deep breakdown view shows Emotional Arc card (data-testid='emotional-arc-card')
Frontend: Deep breakdown view shows What They Hide card (data-testid='what-they-hide-card')
Frontend: Deep breakdown beats show layered subtext (On the surface / What they mean / What they fear)
Frontend: Deep breakdown beats show Physical life section
Frontend: Quick breakdown does NOT show DEEP badge
Frontend: Quick breakdown does NOT show Emotional Arc card
Frontend: Quick breakdown does NOT show What They Hide card
Frontend: Quick breakdown shows simple 'Subtext (inner voice)' format
Regression: Recent breakdowns list displays on upload page
Regression: Clicking recent breakdown loads it correctly
Regression: New Analysis button returns to upload page
seed_data_creation: None - used test script text for analysis
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick/Deep mode feature fully implemented and tested. Quick mode (~15s) returns simple beat subtext without emotional_arc or what_they_hide. Deep mode (~30-60s) returns emotional_arc, what_they_hide, and beats with subtext_surface/subtext_meaning/subtext_fear plus physical_life. Frontend correctly displays different loading screens and breakdown views per mode. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_quick_deep_mode.py can be reused for regression testing.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No bugs found. All Quick/Deep mode features working correctly.
